name: operator override: a rule that exists only in _operator/ has no superseded marker (it is just a regular rule)
setup:
printf 'source:
  id: g
  authoritative_publisher: G
  authoritative_url: https://g.com
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2026-05-04T00:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:S
rules:
  - {id: r-other, name: r-other, description: x, detector: x}
' > tree/google/g.yaml

printf 'source:
  id: o
  authoritative_publisher: O
  authoritative_url: https://o.com
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2026-05-04T00:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:S
rules:
  - {id: r-only-op, name: r-only-op, description: x, detector: x}
' > tree/_operator/o.yaml
